positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a cheerful golden retriever dog silhouette surrounded by abstract floral elements (daisies, lavender, sunflowers) and whimsical forest leaves. The style should be a modern, clean Scandinavian folk art aesthetic, using thick, continuous linework and negative space contrast. Composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing. Color palette is limited to deep emerald green, burnt orange, soft beige, and charcoal black outlines. Strong contrast, graphic quality, perfect for print media.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, messy, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, low detail, photographic, bokeh
